writer.name: 玛丽亚姆·塔法科里 Maryam Tafakory

director.name: 玛丽亚姆·塔法科里 Maryam Tafakory

introduction: When Roya finds a cassette tape her mother buried behind a kitchen cabinet, she knows there must be more. As she begins searching for the tapes, several recorded voices fill her family home, recounting stories of illicit love, irremediable desires, and dreams of liberation. These offer a glimpse into the role of women in a popular leftist movement suppressed by the pre- and post-revolution Iranian governments, the CIA, and MI6.
